description: Warehouse processes mapped to first-pilot suitability for Italian logistics and warehouse buyers.

processes.name: Internal transport between picking and packing
processes.description: Move totes, carts, or small loads from picking aisles to packing benches or consolidation areas.
processes.score_rationale: Highly repetitive, measurable, bounded to one route, and possible without a full warehouse redesign.
constraints: Clear route with manageable pedestrian and forklift interaction
Reliable Wi-Fi or local network coverage
Defined handoff points at picking and packing
WMS task handoff or operator tablet workflow

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: One mapped route between picking and packing
recommended_pilot_shape.shift_pattern: Day shift for week 1, then selected peak windows
recommended_pilot_shape.buyer_risk_reducer: No conveyor removal and no full WMS replacement

processes.name: Picking support and goods-to-operator assistance
processes.description: Assist operators during picking by reducing travel, guiding pick routes, or moving totes through the pick path.
processes.score_rationale: Strong labor and accuracy value, but requires tighter workflow design and operator adoption than simple internal transport.
constraints: Clear SKU and order profile for the pilot zone
Operator training in Italian or simple bilingual material

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: One picking zone and one order family
recommended_pilot_shape.buyer_risk_reducer: Run alongside the existing manual pick process before conversion

processes.name: Parcel sorting and dispatch lane automation
processes.description: Sort parcels by route, carrier, destination, or dispatch wave using modular sorter lanes and barcode logic.
processes.score_rationale: Throughput and error rates are easy to measure, but physical installation and barcode integration must be tightly planned.
constraints: Safe parcel induction and exception handling
Defined fallback process if sorter stops

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: One parcel family or one outbound route cluster
recommended_pilot_shape.shift_pattern: Evening dispatch window after supervised dry runs
recommended_pilot_shape.buyer_risk_reducer: Manual fallback lane remains active during pilot

processes.name: Pallet movement and dispatch staging
processes.description: Move pallets between production, warehouse, staging, and dispatch areas with automation support.
processes.score_rationale: Clear value in forklift reduction and dispatch reliability, with higher safety and mixed-traffic proof burden.
constraints: Floor condition and load stability review

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: One staging route or one production-to-dispatch lane
recommended_pilot_shape.buyer_risk_reducer: Geofenced route and manual forklift fallback

processes.name: End-of-line palletizing
processes.description: Automate repetitive pallet building after packing or production for boxed products.
processes.score_rationale: Strong manual-handling value, but pilot requires physical space, safety guarding, and line integration.

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: One line and one SKU family

processes.name: Inventory scanning and stock verification
processes.description: Use mobile robots or scanning tools to verify stock position, count accuracy, or shelf/bin status.
processes.score_rationale: Can run during low-activity windows with measurable accuracy gains, but data integration and barcode/RFID quality matter.

recommended_pilot_shape.scope: One aisle group or SKU category
recommended_pilot_shape.buyer_risk_reducer: Report exceptions before changing official stock records

processes.name: Inbound staging and putaway support
processes.description: Support movement and prioritization of inbound goods from receiving docks to staging or putaway areas.
processes.score_rationale: Useful where inbound congestion is visible, though variability in receiving quality can complicate clean KPI measurement.

processes.name: Loading and unloading support
processes.description: Assist operators in moving goods around dock doors, loading areas, or trailer-adjacent staging zones.
processes.score_rationale: High operational pain, but dock areas have safety, congestion, and schedule risks that make first pilots harder.

recommended_pilot_shape.systems: One support system in a controlled dock zone
recommended_pilot_shape.scope: One dock door or one route cluster
recommended_pilot_shape.buyer_risk_reducer: Use as a later pilot unless the vendor has strong safety proof

processes.name: Line-side replenishment for manufacturing
processes.description: Move components, packaging, or spare parts from warehouse storage to production-side consumption points.
processes.score_rationale: Clear production value and repeatable routes, but production disruption risk requires strict boundaries.
